name: Incorrect Resource Transfer Between Spheres
description: The product does not properly transfer a resource to another control sphere, or improperly imports a resource from another sphere, providing unintended control over that resource. This can lead to unrestricted file uploads, unsafe external script inclusion, or data leakage across trust boundaries.
detection_pattern: INGRESS or EXTERNAL node transfers a resource across a trust boundary into STORAGE or STRUCTURAL node without CONTROL[boundary_check] or TRANSFORM[sanitize] enforcing proper sphere restrictions
